title: Create repository structure and safety contracts
summary: Bootstrap NovaTacticBot repository with ADVISORY_ONLY=True guardrails, directory layout, and safety documentation.

title: Define tactic_data_contract.md
summary: Document the universal TacticalEvent data contract v1.0 â€” the canonical schema for all events ingested by TacticBot.

title: Define tacticbot_guardrails.md
summary: Document hard operational boundaries: ADVISORY_ONLY=True, no broker, no execution, no portfolio modification, no scheduler modification.

title: Define vision.md â€” why TacticBot exists
summary: Document the purpose, philosophy, and long-term goals of NovaTacticBot as the ecosystem's read-only intelligence layer.

title: Create TacticalEvent dataclass and enumerations
summary: Implement core/tactic_event.py with TacticalEvent dataclass, EventType enum, and StrategyType enum per contract v1.0.

title: Create guardrails enforcement module
summary: Implement utils/guardrails.py with startup check that raises GuardrailViolation if banned broker packages are present. ADVISORY_ONLY enforced at runtime.

title: Create BaseAdapter abstract class
summary: Implement adapters/base_adapter.py with abstract BaseAdapter interface for all source-bot adapters.

title: Create full Phase 1 test suite
summary: 53 tests passing covering TacticalEvent, guardrails, options adapter, and basic analytics.

title: Discover and inventory NovaBotV2Options real data sources
summary: Enumerate all real data files available in NovaBotV2Options. Produce source_inventory.md with file schema documentation.

title: Create NovaBotV2Options real-data adapter
summary: Implement adapters/nova_options_adapter.py reading decision_audit_trail.jsonl, options_events.jsonl, recommendation_accuracy.json, strategy_performance.json, regime_performance.json, signal_lifecycle_summary.json, decision_audit_summary.json.

title: Implement AdapterDiagnostics â€” files found/missing/skipped/errors
summary: Track which files were found, missing, skipped, and errored during adapter parsing. Write adapter_diagnostics.md.

title: Create NovaBotV2 adapter
summary: Implement adapters/nova_botv2_adapter.py reading NovaBotV2 result_snapshot.json, scheduler logs, and reconciliation reports. Read-only, no broker import. Agree source schema with NovaBotV2 maintainer.

title: Create MarketRegimeBot adapter
summary: Implement adapters/market_regime_adapter.py reading MarketRegimeBot result_snapshot.json. Surface regime, confidence, risk_level, timestamp. No execution context.

title: Create NovaAllocationBot adapter
summary: Implement adapters/nova_allocation_adapter.py reading NovaAllocationBot result_snapshot.json. Surface allocation percentages, status, and dry_run_state. No monetary data.

title: Create NovaMemoryBot report adapter
summary: Implement adapters/nova_memory_adapter.py reading NovaMemoryBot report files. Surface report freshness, phase, and pending task count. mtime + file presence only.

title: Create NovaBridge adapter
summary: Implement adapters/nova_bridge_adapter.py reading NovaBridge result_snapshot.json and dispatch_readiness_report. Surface ecosystem health context for cross-bot analysis.

title: Multi-source data merge and deduplication
summary: Merge TacticalEvents from all bot adapters into a single unified event stream. Deduplicate on event_id/signal_id. Handle schema mismatches gracefully with warnings.

title: Source inventory v2 â€” multi-bot schema documentation
summary: Extend source_inventory.md to document schemas from all bot adapters. Include field availability matrix per source, known gaps, and data freshness expectations.

title: Define TacticBot internal event log schema
summary: Define the schema for TacticBot's own internal event log (tactic_events.jsonl). Events: ANALYSIS_RUN, REPORT_GENERATED, ADAPTER_ERROR, SOURCE_MISSING, RECOMMENDATION_PRODUCED. All writes to data/logs/ only.

title: Implement TacticBot run log writer
summary: Write a structured JSON log entry per TacticBot analysis run: timestamp, sources ingested, event counts by type, analysis duration, reports generated, and any warnings.

title: Implement adapter error event logging
summary: Log ADAPTER_ERROR events when a source file fails to parse. Include file path, error type, and event count impact. Enables data quality tracking over time.

title: Implement source staleness detection and logging
summary: Detect when source data files have not been updated within a configurable threshold. Log SOURCE_STALE events with file path and age. Warn in adapter_diagnostics.md.

title: Create run history tracker
summary: Append each TacticBot run summary to data/system/run_history.json. Track run count, events processed, reports generated, and any errors over time.

title: Write tests for event logging
summary: Test that run log writes correctly, adapter errors are captured, SOURCE_STALE fires correctly, and no writes occur outside data/logs/ and data/system/.

title: Analytics Engine v1 â€” strategy, regime, rejection, recommendation quality
summary: Core analytics passes: strategy win rates, regime breakdown, rejection reason analysis, recommendation quality scoring. Returns AnalyticsResult.

title: Analytics Engine v2 â€” symbol concentration, confidence distribution, candidate ranking
summary: Extended analytics: symbol concentration (Herfindahl), confidence/score distribution histograms, candidate ranking by composite score.

title: Rolling-window win-rate tracker
summary: Compute win rates over rolling windows: last-10, last-30, last-100 events. Detect declining trends. Output rolling_win_rates in AnalyticsResult.

title: Historical baseline snapshot storage
summary: After each analysis run, persist a snapshot of key metrics (win rate, avg PnL, strategy distribution) to data/system/analytics_baseline.json. Enables trend detection across runs.

title: Cross-run trend analysis
summary: Compare current run analytics against historical baselines. Detect significant metric changes (win rate drop >5%, strategy distribution shift). Report trends in tacticbot_report.md.

title: PnL distribution analysis
summary: Analyze the distribution of paper trade PnL outcomes: mean, median, std, skewness, kurtosis, and percentile buckets. Surface in reports.

title: Holding period analytics
summary: Analyze average, median, and distribution of holding periods per strategy and per outcome (win/loss). Identify whether shorter or longer holds correlate with better outcomes.

title: Strategy performance analytics engine
summary: Aggregate paper trade outcomes by strategy_id. Metrics: trade count, win rate, avg PnL, median PnL, premium capture rate, avg holding period, avg R/R at entry.

title: Strategy ranking by composite score
summary: Rank strategies by composite score (win rate Ã— avg PnL normalized). Surface top-N and bottom-N strategies in report.

title: Strategy streak detection (win/loss runs)
summary: Detect consecutive win and loss streaks per strategy. Flag strategies with loss streaks â‰¥3. Include streak analysis section in report.

title: Strategy score calibration analysis
summary: Check whether high signal scores actually predict better outcomes. Bucket signals by score decile and compare actual win rates. Report calibration quality.

title: Strategy edge erosion detector
summary: Compare rolling win rate to long-term baseline per strategy. Flag when current rolling rate is â‰¥10 percentage points below baseline. Alert in report as EDGE_EROSION_WARNING.

title: Best/worst symbol analysis per strategy
summary: For each strategy, rank symbols by win rate and avg PnL. Identify which symbols are driving performance and which are consistently underperforming.

title: Strategy temporal pattern analysis (time-of-day, day-of-week)
summary: Analyze whether signal entry time-of-day or day-of-week correlates with outcomes. Detect if certain strategies underperform on specific market sessions.

title: Strategy test suite â€” v3 analytics
summary: Add tests for streak detection, score calibration, edge erosion, symbol ranking, and temporal patterns. Target: 130+ total tests.

title: Regime performance analytics engine
summary: Group signal, recommendation, and paper trade outcomes by market regime. Metrics: win rate, avg PnL, rejection rate, recommendation quality, and strategy distribution per regime.

title: Regime bias detector
summary: Detect whether the bot over-trades in specific regimes relative to signal quality. Compare trade frequency per regime vs expected base rate. Flag REGIME_BIAS if >2x expected.

title: Regime-strategy fit matrix
summary: Build a matrix of strategy performance per regime. Identify which strategy-regime combinations have the best win rates. Output as JSON and Markdown table in report.

title: IV environment impact analysis
summary: Analyze how implied volatility environment (HIGH/NORMAL/LOW) interacts with strategy performance. Complement regime analysis with IV context.

title: Regime transition impact analysis
summary: Analyze performance of trades entered just before or after a regime transition. Detect whether transitions are predictive of outcome changes.

title: Regime analytics test suite
summary: Add tests for regime bias detection, regime-strategy matrix, IV environment analysis, and regime transition impact.

title: Recommendation accuracy tracker
summary: Compare advisory recommendations against later paper outcomes. Track whether top-ranked recommendations outperformed lower-ranked, and whether R/R estimates were realistic.

title: Recommendation rank calibration analysis
summary: Assess whether rank-1 recommendations consistently outperform rank-N. Report calibration coefficient (ideal = positive monotone). Flag if rank-1 win rate < rank-5.

title: Rejected signal counterfactual analysis
summary: For rejected signals that could theoretically have been tracked (known outcome), assess whether rejection was the correct decision. Report false-positive rejection rate.

title: R/R estimate accuracy scoring
summary: Compare estimated_rr at recommendation time against realized_rr from paper outcomes. Compute mean absolute error of R/R estimates. Flag systematic over/underestimation.

title: Recommendation quality trend tracking
summary: Track recommendation accuracy and rank calibration over time using run_history. Detect if recommendation quality is improving or degrading.

title: Cross-bot correlation analysis â€” NovaBotV2 vs NovaBotV2Options
summary: After NovaBotV2Adapter is complete: correlate NovaBotV2 equity performance with NovaBotV2Options advisory recommendations. Detect if options signals provide incremental alpha.

title: Regime-allocation-performance triangle analysis
summary: Combine MarketRegimeBot regime data, NovaAllocationBot split recommendations, and performance outcomes into a three-way analysis. Detect regime-allocation-outcome relationships.

title: Ecosystem health impact on signal quality
summary: Correlate NovaBridge ecosystem health scores with NovaBotV2Options signal quality. Detect if ecosystem disruptions (stale snapshots, bot downtime) degrade advisory quality.

title: Cross-bot event timeline reconstruction
summary: Merge timestamped events from all bot adapters into a unified timeline. Enable temporal correlation analysis across bots.

title: Memory-informed signal context analysis
summary: Use NovaMemoryBot report data to contextualize signal history. Detect if low-quality memory states coincide with lower recommendation accuracy.

title: Create Markdown intelligence report (tacticbot_report.md)
summary: Generate data/reports/tacticbot_report.md with all analytics sections: strategy analysis, regime analysis, rejection analysis, recommendation quality, symbol concentration, confidence distribution, candidate ranking.

title: Create adapter diagnostics report (adapter_diagnostics.md)
summary: Separate diagnostics report: files found/missing/skipped, parse errors, schema mismatches, event counts per source.

title: Create HTML dashboard
summary: Create a self-contained HTML dashboard from AnalyticsResult. Sections: strategy performance table, regime breakdown, recommendation quality, edge erosion warnings, regime bias. No broker, no execution, no live data calls.

title: Extend HTML dashboard with cross-bot analytics section
summary: Add cross-bot correlation panel to HTML dashboard. Requires PHASE_8 cross-bot analytics complete.

title: Edge erosion warning panel in dashboard
summary: Add prominent edge erosion warning section to both Markdown and HTML dashboards. Color-coded: GREEN (healthy), YELLOW (watch), RED (edge eroding).

title: Create source inventory report (source_inventory.md)
summary: Document all source files discovered by adapters, their schemas, field availability, and event counts.

title: Create structured JSON analytics export
summary: Export AnalyticsResult as data/reports/analytics_export.json for consumption by other tools. Include all strategy, regime, and recommendation analytics in machine-readable form.

title: Create weekly intelligence briefing template
summary: Design a structured weekly briefing template covering: executive summary, strategy rankings, regime-strategy recommendations, edge erosion alerts, and cross-bot highlights.

title: Create advisory tactical suggestions section in report
summary: Add an advisory suggestions section to tacticbot_report.md: strategy scaling suggestions (human-approval required), regime-strategy fit recommendations, edge erosion mitigations. All human-review mandatory.

title: Create TacticBot result_snapshot.json for NovaBridge
summary: Produce data/system/result_snapshot.json with: phase, status, top_strategy, top_regime_fit, last_run_timestamp, event_count, edge_erosion_warnings, recommendation_quality_score. Consumable by NovaBridge adapter.

title: Automated weekly report runner
summary: Create a scheduled runner for weekly report generation. Runs the full analytics pipeline and generates all reports. No Telegram delivery â€” report output to data/reports/ only.

title: Design NovaMemoryBot integration contract
summary: Document how TacticBot will read NovaMemoryBot historical context. Define which report fields are relevant, how to handle missing/stale memory reports, and safety boundaries.

title: Memory-contextualized analytics pass
summary: Run an analytics pass that incorporates historical context from NovaMemoryBot: prior strategy rankings, documented phase decisions, and known data quality events.

title: SAVEGAME.md historical context ingestion
summary: Parse SAVEGAME.md session entries to extract phase history, key decisions, and commit references as context for analytics interpretation.

title: Produce TacticBot-to-MemoryBot summary export
summary: Write data/reports/tacticbot_memory_summary.md in a format consumable by NovaMemoryBot. Include top strategy rankings, regime fit matrix, and current edge erosion state.

title: Design AllocationBot integration contract
summary: Document how TacticBot strategy rankings and regime-strategy fit matrix will flow as advisory input to NovaAllocationBot. Define schema and safety boundaries. No execution path.

title: Tactic-based allocation recommendation advisory
summary: Based on strategy rankings and regime fit, produce an advisory allocation suggestion (e.g., favour covered calls in BULL regime). Output to data/reports/ as advisory text. No execution â€” human review required.

title: Export allocation advisory to result_snapshot.json
summary: Include tactic_allocation_advisory field in TacticBot result_snapshot.json. AllocationBot can read this field as one advisory input among several. Advisory only â€” no execution.

title: Allocation outcome feedback loop
summary: FUTURE â€” Read AllocationBot allocation history to assess whether TacticBot-informed allocation periods show better outcomes than non-TacticBot-informed periods. Requires substantial data accumulation.

title: Statistical significance testing for strategy rankings
summary: FUTURE â€” Apply chi-squared or bootstrap significance tests to strategy win rate differences. Flag which rankings are statistically significant vs noise. Requires Nâ‰¥30 trades per strategy.

title: Sharpe-like strategy risk-adjusted ranking
summary: FUTURE â€” Compute a Sharpe-like ratio (mean PnL / std PnL) for each strategy. Rank by risk-adjusted return rather than raw win rate.

title: Monte Carlo simulation for strategy robustness
summary: FUTURE â€” Run Monte Carlo resampling on historical trade outcomes to estimate strategy robustness and probability of drawdown scenarios.

title: Correlation matrix across all strategy-symbol pairs
summary: FUTURE â€” Build a correlation matrix of P/L outcomes across strategy-symbol pairs. Detect diversification quality and concentration risk.

title: Machine learning strategy classifier (experimental)
summary: FUTURE â€” Experimental: train a lightweight classifier (logistic regression or decision tree) on historical signal features to predict likely outcome. Advisory output only â€” no execution. Requires Nâ‰¥100 labelled outcomes.

title: Multi-bot executive briefing generation
summary: FUTURE â€” Generate a unified multi-bot executive briefing combining TacticBot analytics, NovaMemoryBot history, and NovaBridge ecosystem state into a single weekly report.

title: Phase readiness gate review â€” multi-bot adapters
summary: FUTURE â€” Human review gate: verify all multi-bot adapters (NovaBotV2, MarketRegimeBot, AllocationBot, MemoryBot, NovaBridge) are complete and tests passing before advancing to cross-bot analytics.

title: Phase readiness gate review â€” analytics engines
summary: FUTURE â€” Human review gate: verify all analytics engines (PHASE_4â€“PHASE_8) complete, test suite passing, baselines stored, edge erosion detection operational.

title: Phase readiness gate review â€” reporting and dashboard
summary: FUTURE â€” Human review gate: verify all reports (Markdown, HTML, JSON export, result_snapshot) are generated correctly and contain actionable insights.

title: Guardrails and ADVISORY_ONLY final audit
summary: FUTURE â€” Final audit: verify ADVISORY_ONLY=True is enforced at all entry points, no broker imports present in any module, no execution path accessible, write operations limited to data/ directory only.

title: Full test suite health check â€” target 200+ tests
summary: FUTURE â€” Verify test suite covers all adapters, analytics engines, dashboard generators, logging, and cross-bot scenarios. Target 200+ tests, 0 failures.

title: LoggingBot data source preparation
summary: PLANNING ONLY â€” Document how a future LoggingBot would provide centralized structured logs to TacticBot. No implementation.

title: ResearchBot fundamental data integration
summary: PLANNING ONLY â€” Document how a future ResearchBot providing fundamental/earnings data could enrich TacticBot signal analysis. No implementation.

title: NewsBot sentiment integration
summary: PLANNING ONLY â€” Document how a future NewsBot providing news sentiment scores could be correlated with signal quality and regime changes in TacticBot analysis. No implementation.

title: MacroBot macro regime integration
summary: PLANNING ONLY â€” Document how a future MacroBot providing macro-economic regime signals (yield curve, inflation, Fed policy) could layer into TacticBot regime analytics. No implementation.

title: TaxBot realized gains impact analysis
summary: PLANNING ONLY â€” Document how a future TaxBot providing tax-adjusted P/L data could refine TacticBot strategy ranking to account for after-tax performance. No implementation.

title: Adapter schema compatibility validator
summary: Create a validator that checks each adapter's output against the TacticalEvent contract. Report fields missing from source data, unexpected fields, and type mismatches without crashing the pipeline.

title: Recommendation produced event logging
summary: Log RECOMMENDATION_PRODUCED events each time TacticBot produces a ranked advisory suggestion. Include strategy_id, regime_fit, score, and run_id for traceability.

title: Strategy regime-conditional win rate matrix
summary: For each strategy, compute win rates conditioned on regime. Output as a regime Ã— strategy matrix table in reports. Enables targeted strategy selection per market condition.

title: Volatility spike impact analysis
summary: Identify events occurring during VIX spikes (>30) and analyze outcome distributions. Determine which strategies are most resilient during volatility spikes.

title: Allocation-adjusted performance comparison
summary: Weight strategy and symbol performance by AllocationBot recommended capital allocations. Produce allocation-weighted performance metrics for a more realistic view of portfolio impact.

title: Write-safety and read-only behavior test suite
summary: Extend test_readonly_behavior.py to cover all Phase 2â€“9 additions. Verify no writes occur to source bot directories, no broker imports are introduced, and ADVISORY_ONLY is not bypassed.

title: Report generator extension tests
summary: Add tests for all new report sections added in PHASE_10: advisory suggestions, result_snapshot, JSON analytics export, and weekly briefing template generation.

title: Memory integration test suite
summary: Add tests covering NovaMemoryBot adapter integration, memory-contextualized analytics, SAVEGAME ingestion, and TacticBot-to-MemoryBot export. Confirm no writes to MemoryBot directories.

title: Allocation integration test suite
summary: Add tests covering AllocationBot adapter integration, tactic-based advisory generation, result_snapshot export, and contract alignment. Confirm no execution paths.

title: Ecosystem integration documentation â€” final handover
summary: FUTURE â€” Produce final handover documentation summarizing TacticBot's full architecture, data sources, analytics coverage, known gaps, and recommended next development cycle.
